name: miroshark
description: MiroShark - A concise and versatile swarm intelligence engine for predicting everything

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.predev: node -e "const{execSync:e}=require('child_process');[3000,5001].forEach(p=>{try{const o=e('lsof -ti:'+p,{encoding:'utf8'}).trim();if(o){e('kill -9 '+o);console.log('Killed stale process on port '+p)}}catch{}})"
scripts.backend: cd backend && uv run python run.py
